evidence: CAPA overdue signals (capa_overdue kind) appear in VPI risk queue via SubjectRiskQueue component
Protocol deviation panel renders in Subject 360° workspace at subjectId/workspace
Signal tone mapped: bg-rose-100 (overdue CAPA) — visible in coordinator inbox
SubjectDeviationsPanel renders confirmed + open deviations with status and severity badges
Panel wired into app/(ops)/subjects/[subjectId]/workspace/page.tsx via Promise.all data load
CAPA overdue signals route through existing VPI pipeline (build-from-signals → fallback-signals)
No new parallel action queue introduced — signals feed coordinator risk queue
capa_overdue kind registered in SIGNAL_PRIORITIES (91), SIGNAL_OWNER_ROLES (Site Coordinator)
Overdue CAPAs appear as coordinator actions in OwnerWorkflowQueue via VPI feed

tasks.title: Deviation adjudication FSM
tasks.notes: Status enum extended to 8 values: candidate, pi_review, confirmed, capa_linked, resolved, open, under_review, closed. API auto-stamps adjudicatedBy/At on confirmed/capa_linked/resolved transitions.

tasks.title: CAPA → VPI risk queue feed
tasks.notes: capa_overdue signal kind added to exhaustive union. Loader queries capa_actions joined via protocol_deviations to study_subjects. Overdue = status IN (open, in_progress, under_review) AND due_date < today.

tasks.title: Governance signal lifecycle (supersede, reopen, adjudication stamps)
tasks.notes: Columns added: superseded_by (uuid FK self-reference), reopened_at (timestamptz), adjudicated_by (uuid FK auth.users), adjudicated_at (timestamptz). API accepts superseded_by in body.

tasks.title: Protocol deviation panel in Subject 360°
tasks.notes: Panel shows open deviation count, status + severity badges for each deviation. OPEN_STATUSES covers both legacy (open, under_review) and new FSM states (candidate, pi_review, confirmed, capa_linked).
